items.title: Kelela and PinkPantheress Take It to “The Bridge” on New Song
items.summary: The final single from New Avatar before Kelela drops the full album on Friday

items.title: Carmen Villain Announces New Album Memoria
items.summary: The ambient dub producer borrowed the LP’s title from Apichatpong Weerasethakul’s 2021 film

items.title: Terrace Martin, Robert Glasper, and Kamasi Washington's Dinner Party Return With New Album
items.summary: Watchu Bringing?, their third collaborative LP with producer 9th Wonder, arrives August 7

items.title: The Jazz Scene in Glasgow is Blossoming
items.summary: Diving into a community that’s as vibrant as it is idiosyncratic. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.
